name: Sourdough Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Begin by mixing the active sourdough starter.
2. Add the melted margarine to the bowl with the sourdough starter.
3. Pour in the cornmeal, salt, sugar, sour cream or yogurt, and eggs.
4. Stir until just combined.
5. Gradually add the unbleached flour, cream of tartar, and baking powder.
6. Transfer the batter to a buttered pan.
7. Bake at 375°F (190°C) to 400°F (200°C) for approximately 15 minutes.
Note: For safety, ensure all ingredients are dry before mixing.
